items.name_en: PETIT FLOT MINI is a refined mini version of the PETIT FLOT PM. Lightweight and compact, it retains the iconic bucket silhouette. The exquisite leather shoulder strap allows for easy switching between handbag, shoulder bag, and crossbody styles, showcasing its practical and versatile nature.

items.name_en: 【Top Quality Replica】M82957 Blue Denim! Single zipper wallet series Zippy Coin Purse. This zipper coin purse is crafted from Monogram jacquard denim, accented with contrasting calfskin trim. It reinterprets the classic Monogram DLm pattern using jacquard weaving technology and creates a stonewashed denim effect. Dimensions: 11*8.5*2cm. 🎁🎁

items.name_en: 【Top Grade】M13212 👏👏 Monogram Denim Victorine Wallet, a seasonal release featuring a vibrant blue tone. Made from organic cotton with leather lining, it features multiple pockets and slots to secure cards, tickets, and coins. Gold-tone rivets add a touch of sophistication. Size: 12x2.5x9.5cm. 🎁🎁

items.name_en: 💖【Complete Original Packaging】💖【New Arrival】Miu Women's Nappa Suede Leather Handbag, inspired by a classic design, restructured for a lighter feel and a fresh personality, creating a classic piece with eternal charm. Embossed letter logo, adding a signature element 👝. Features a handle, suitable as a handbag or shoulder bag! Removable charm, vintage gold hardware, front embossed letter logo, lined with a zip pocket and slip pocket!
